# Modern AI Engineer Roadmap

This site is a beginner-to-master roadmap for modern AI engineering.

Canonical URL: https://aiZKP.github.io/modern-ai-engineer-roadmap/
Repository: https://github.com/aiZKP/modern-ai-engineer-roadmap

Primary pages:

- / - Overview
- /how-to-use/ - How to walk the roadmap
- /roadmap-map/ - Dependency map and role paths
- /stages/00-orientation/ through /stages/10-mastery/ - stage-by-stage path
- /projects/project-ladder/ - build artifacts and portfolio sequence
- /resources/sources/ - sources studied and external references
